mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.USER_ACCOUNT, A.PASSWD, A.USER_NAME, A.SEX, A.DEPT_ID, A.IS_SUPERADMIN, A.MOBILE, A.EMAIL, A.STATUS, A.PSD_UPD_DATE, A.SORT_NUM, A.REMARK, A.IS_LABOR, A.POST_CODE, A.POST_NAME, A.UNIT_TYPE_CODE, A.UNIT_TYPE_NAME, A.TEL, A.MOBILE FROM SYS_USER A
A.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT A.ID, A.USER_ACCOUNT, A.PASSWD, A.USER_NAME, A.SEX, A.DEPT_ID, A.IS_SUPERADMIN, A.MOBILE, A.EMAIL, A.STATUS, A.PSD_UPD_DATE, A.SORT_NUM, A.REMARK, A.IS_LABOR, A.POST_CODE, A.POST_NAME, A.UNIT_TYPE_CODE, A.UNIT_TYPE_NAME FROM SYS_USER A
a.USER_ACCOUNT = #{userAccount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_USER( ID, USER_ACCOUNT, PASSWD, USER_NAME, DEPT_ID, IS_SUPERADMIN, MOBILE, EMAIL, STATUS, SORT_NUM, SEX, REMARK, IS_LABOR, POST_CODE, POST_NAME, UNIT_TYPE_CODE, UNIT_TYPE_NAME, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isSuperadmin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sex, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isLabor}, #{postCode}, #{postName}, #{unitTypeCode}, #{unitTypeName}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_USER SET USER_ACCOUNT = #{userAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_NAME = #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, IS_SUPERADMIN = #{isSuperadmin, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MOBILE = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EMAIL = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, SEX = #{sex, jdbcType=BIGINT}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_LABOR = #{isLabor}, POST_CODE = #{postCode}, POST_NAME = #{postName}, UNIT_TYPE_CODE = #{unitTypeCode}, UNIT_TYPE_NAME = #{unitTypeName}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}

UPDATE SYS_USER SET PASSWD = #{passwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE SYS_USER SET
MOBILE = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EMAIL = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID FROM SYS_ROLE_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{id}

select ID, USER_ACCOUNT, PASSWD, USER_NAME, DEPT_ID, IS_SUPERADMIN, MOBILE, EMAIL, STATUS, SORT_NUM, SEX, REMARK, IS_LABOR, POST_CODE, POST_NAME, UNIT_TYPE_CODE, UNIT_TYPE_NAME, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME from SYS_USER where id in
#{item}

SELECT ID FROM SYS_USER WHERE POST_CODE IN
#{postKey}
